chunks.text: One Sunday, I opened an old family photo album.
My sister asked, “ Have you ever been to Tokyo?
” “ Yes, I have visited Tokyo three times,” I answered.
there was a picture of my brother on the top of a mountain.
“ Have you ever climbed a tall mountain, Tom?
” “ No, I have never climbed one,” he answered.
My sister has never seen snow before, and she said so with a little sadness.
My father has traveled to many countries for work.
He has been to America many times.
My mother has met a famous singer once, and she smiled with a little pride.
I have read this book twice because it is so interesting.
My brother said he has never eaten such a sweet cake before.
